query:
SELECT id, code, name, tenantId FROM warehouseZones WHERE code = 'NCG' OR name LIKE '%NCG%' OR name LIKE '%Quarentena%' LIMIT 10;
SELECT id, code, zoneCode, tenantId, status FROM warehouseLocations WHERE zoneCode = 'NCG' OR code LIKE '%NCG%' LIMIT 10;
